label: Strategy Summary
description: Active strategy count, total AUM, total P&L, and MTD P&L with current execution mode badge.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: each metric value rendered as '—' when isLoading.

0.7.note: shows 0/0 Active Strategies and zeroed totals when no strategies — acceptable for a summary strip.

0.8.note: error boundary at WidgetWrapper; context silently falls back to DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.

1.2.note: context reads useGlobalScope(), filters via getStrategyIdsForScope + getClientIdsForOrgs.

1.3.note: org filter change propagates through context.

1.7.note: no reference data in widget or lib/mocks.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (live AUM/P&L summary), paper ✓ (paper mode totals), batch ✓ (historical snapshot totals).

3.2.note: context reads useExecutionMode() and exposes mode; widget reads isLoading from mode-aware context.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget shows paper strategy totals. KpiSummaryWidget is read-only — no action to disable.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget. Data driven by context.

3.3.note: No order entry — read-only KPI strip.

3.4.note: Human verify: batch indicator visible when in batch mode (may be handled by layout wrapper).

l3.notes: Agent checks done. Human must verify 3.4.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers. Pure display widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: 4 KPI metrics display correctly (Active Strategies, Total AUM, Total P&L, MTD P&L).

4.8.note: Human verify: KPI strip fits in minH=1 (2 grid rows).

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies in scope. Widget provides aggregate summary across all active strategies — not tied to a specific strategy type.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. Widget is aggregate — L5 walkthrough is minimal.

l6.notes: L6 not started — deferred until L5 walkthrough complete.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.4.note: No img/input/interactive elements. Pure display widget.

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=4, minH=1.

l8.notes: 8.1-8.4 all pass — cleanest L8 in domain. 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: KPI summary strips are singleton header widgets per tab. Should remain separate from data widgets.

relationships.notes: Standalone KPI header widget. Singleton — only one instance per layout. Aggregates strategy metrics from useStrategiesData() context.

dataContract.notes: Aggregation computed client-side from strategy list. Production: could be pre-aggregated by strategy service for performance.

gaps: AUM/P&L aggregation is client-side — performance concern at 100+ strategies
formatCurrency from lib/reference-data may not handle all currency formats
coverage.notes: Simplest widget in domain. No coverage gaps for its core function.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
